chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 118 & 119 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case. For hearing of main case. -------------- 21.05.2025 Mr. Nadeem Hamza, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Anwar Kashif Mumtaz, Advocate for Respondent. ----------------- None present on behalf the Applicant nor any intimation received; whereas, matters pertain to year 2012. On the last date of hearing as well, no one was in attendance; therefore, these Reference Applications ought to have been dismissed in non- prosecution. However, on perusal of the proposed questions of law including question No.1, it appears that the same already stands decided against the department by a learned Division Bench of this Court in ITRA No. 190 of 2012 vide order dated 13.06.2016; hence no case for indulgence is made out even otherwise. Be that as it may, since nobody is in attendance to assist the Court in matters pertaining to the year 2012, both these matters are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place copy of this order in the connected case. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz
